what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets channel image asset named Icon_Gold_Unique; it stores metadata such as id, address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, and timestamps, with no prose body.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and an empty body.
The asset is an image/png with width and height set to 0.
Version 1 points to blob://b2:57c49f2c45ad25b98273ba2e331d714f and has an empty alt text.
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image asset.
The alt text in the version entry is empty.
The record is version 1 and has no linked relations.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed schema for channel-memory image records.
Includes a stable id, address, blob reference, and version history block.
Timestamps use ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing or unprocessed image dimensions.
Empty alt text reduces accessibility metadata for the icon.
No links or relations are provided, limiting discoverability.
notes: A minimal, first-version ledger card for a gold unique icon asset with placeholder dimensions and no relationships.
questions: Is the empty alt text intentional or awaiting review?
What does the 'dragnet' source signify for this asset?
intention_signals: The file appears intended to register a unique gold-tier icon in a design-assets channel so it can be referenced by a stable address and versioned blob.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, addressable metadata record for a specific icon asset, including a blob reference and authorship provenance that a fused ledger can keep as a canonical entry point.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger record for the design-assets image 'Icon_Gold_Unique', an image/png at version 1 referenced by blob b2:57c49f2c45ad25b98273ba2e331d714f with 0x0 dimensions and empty alt text.
